title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN LUIS IN THE CITY OF GINGOOG, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN LUIS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 1047 / 94 OG No. 23, 59 Supp. (June 8, 1998)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8463, January 19, 1998 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN LUIS IN THE CITY OF GINGOOG, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN LUIS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the

Philippines

in Congress

assembled:

SECTION 1.

There shall be established a

high school in

Barangay

San Luis, City of

Gingoog

, Province of

Misamis

Oriental, to be known as the San Luis National High School.

SEC. 2.

The Secretary of the Department

of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue such rules and regulations as may

be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3.

The amount necessary to carry out

the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act

of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4.

This Act shall take effect upon

its approval.

Approved, lapsed into law on January 19, 1998, without the

signature of the President, in accordance with Article VI, Section 27 (1) of the

Constitution.
